title: AI SDK extraction stub pattern
rationale: Kept migration stubs for createAIService/resolveLanguageModel that throw at runtime but preserve TypeScript signatures. Prevents cap-adapter-server typecheck breakage until cap-ai-provider capability is created. @ai-sdk/* and ai packages removed from core/package.json.

content: Spec 55 life-system interfaces in packages/core/src/types/life-system.ts: Sensor<TSignal>, Signal, SensorSignal, SensorContext, Baseline, MemoryStore, Detector<TEvent,TResult>. SignalSource: event_bus | server | api | graphql | mcp | ui.
